name: film-convert
description: Desktop Application for Film Negatives Digitization and Conversion

scripts.build:python: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const path = require('path'); const isWin = process.platform === 'win32'; const pyinstaller = isWin ? path.join('.venv', 'Scripts', 'pyinstaller.exe') : path.join('.venv', 'bin', 'pyinstaller'); const res = spawnSync(pyinstaller, ['--clean', '--noconfirm', 'web_ui.spec'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: isWin }); process.exit(res.status ?? 0);"
